key.name: flight-ident
key.description: Flight identifier such as UAL1234. The extension queries AeroAPI and picks the in-progress flight based on status and progress percentage.

key.name: poll-seconds
key.description: The refresh interval for querying flight status.

key.name: display-mode
key.description: How flight progress is shown in the top bar. "percentage" shows a text label like "UAL1234 42%". "progress-bar" shows an animated airplane emoji moving across a progress track.

key.name: debug-mode
key.description: When enabled, the extension uses bundled mock flight data with a 1-second polling interval instead of querying the live API.

key.name: offline-mode
key.description: When enabled, the extension fetches flight data once and then calculates progress locally from the current time relative to departure and arrival timestamps. No further API calls are made until offline mode is disabled.

key.name: offline-ident
key.description: The flight identifier cached when offline mode was activated.

key.name: offline-departure
key.description: ISO 8601 departure timestamp cached for offline progress calculation (resolved from scheduled_out or estimated_out).

key.name: offline-arrival
key.description: ISO 8601 arrival timestamp cached for offline progress calculation (resolved from estimated_in or scheduled_in).
